# Getting Help

## Bug reports and feature requests

Use the [issue tracker](https://github.com/braveness23/reaclaw/issues).
Check existing issues before opening a new one.

## Questions about usage or configuration

Open a [GitHub Discussion](https://github.com/braveness23/reaclaw/discussions).
Include your platform, REAPER version, and ReaClaw version (`GET /health`).

## Documentation

- [API reference](docs/API.md)
- [Deployment guide](docs/DEPLOYMENT.md)
- [MCP integration guide](docs/MCP.md)
- [Usage examples](docs/EXAMPLES.md)

## Security issues

Follow [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md) — do not open a public issue.

## Response time

This is a small open-source project maintained on a best-effort basis.
Expect responses within a few days for bugs; longer for feature discussions.
